info.title: GitFlowAI API
info.description: AI-powered GitHub Pull Request Reviewer. Automates code review with intelligent analysis across security, performance, readability, maintainability, and code smells.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from GitHub OAuth login. Include as: Authorization: Bearer <token>

openai_api_key.description: Masked API key (only last 4 chars shown)

get.description: Returns the current server status and API version.
Redirects the user to GitHub for OAuth authorization.
Handles the OAuth callback from GitHub. Exchanges the code for an access token and JWT, then redirects to the frontend with the token.

302.description: Redirect to frontend with JWT token

get.description: Returns the authenticated user`s profile information.

post.description: Logs out the current user (client-side token removal).

get.description: Returns paginated repositories for the authenticated user. Optionally syncs from GitHub first.

parameters.name: sync
parameters.description: Sync repositories from GitHub before fetching

get.description: Returns a single repository by its database ID.
Returns pull requests for a given repository from the GitHub API.

200.description: Array of pull requests from GitHub API

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific pull request including changed files and their diffs.

200.description: Pull request detail with files and diffs

get.description: Returns all reviews for a given pull request (by pull_request_id query param).

post.description: Triggers an AI-powered code review on a pull request. Fetches the PR diff from GitHub, sends it to OpenAI for analysis, and stores the result.

get.description: Returns aggregated review statistics and all completed reviews for the authenticated user.
Returns paginated review history for the authenticated user with search and sort options.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by repo name, PR number, or summary

get.description: Returns full review details including parsed categories and issues.

200.description: Review detail with all categories and issues

delete.description: Deletes a review if it belongs to the authenticated user.

get.description: Downloads a PDF file containing the full review report including summary, all category issues, and suggested improvements.
Downloads a Markdown file containing the full review report including summary, all category issues, and suggested improvements.
Returns the authenticated user's profile information along with review statistics (total reviews given and average score).
Returns the authenticated user's settings including notification preferences and masked OpenAI API key.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's settings. Only provided fields are updated.

openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key for AI reviews

get.description: Searches across repositories, pull requests, and reviews with optional filters.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (open/closed/merged or review status)

200.description: Paginated search results with type summary

get.description: Returns a simplified list of all repositories for use in search dropdowns.
Returns comprehensive analytics including average score, score trends over time, issue distribution by category, most reviewed repositories, monthly review counts, and common code smells.
Returns database version and table list.
Returns the database connection status.
Returns record counts for each table.

tags.name: Export
tags.description: Export reviews as PDF or Markdown

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Global search across repositories, PRs, and reviews
